name: mat_silent_island_architecture
description: Architecture of the S. pombe silent mating-type island. mat2-P and mat3-M storage cassettes sit ~15 kb apart in a ~20 kb Clr4-Swi6-silenced heterochromatic island flanked by IR-L and IR-R inverted repeats. The cenH element between mat2 and mat3 carries dg/dh-like sequence homologous to centromeric otr and seeds RNAi-dependent silencing. mat1, mat2-P and mat3-M share H1/H2/H3 homology boxes outside the cell-type-specific 'Y' coding sequence; reads covering only H1/H2/H3 multi-map to all three cassettes.
expected_copy_count: 3 cassettes total (mat1 active + mat2-P + mat3-M silent), all on chrII
